description: Tanren control plane for agentic software delivery — pnpm workspace root for the web frontend.

pnpm.//: Override transitive pins where the upstream tracker is behind a security advisory. postcss < 8.5.10 is GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (XSS via unescaped </style>); next 16.2.4 still pins 8.4.31 transitively. Drop this override once next bumps its postcss range. (Vite is pinned to ^7 by a direct dep on apps/web because Storybook 9.1 still declares a ^5||^6||^7 peer range — overrides alone do not influence transitive resolution.)
